title: How to Prepare for a Lab Test: MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:
stand your preparation instructions before the day of your test.
References 
Accu Reference Medical Lab [Internet]. Linden (NJ): Accu Reference Medical Labs; c2004-2024. Preparing for Your Test; [cited 2024 Apr 09]; [about 3 screens]. Available from: https://accureference.com/testprep/ 
Cleveland Clinic: Healthessentials: Primary Care [Internet]. Cleveland (OH): Cleveland Clinic; c2024. What You Should Know About Fasting Before a Blood Test; [2022 Feb 15; cited 2024 Apr 09]; [about 4 screens]. Available from: https://health.clevelandclinic.org/fasting-before-blood-test 
FDA: U.S. Food and Drug Administration [Internet]. Silver Spring (MD): U.S. Department of Health and Human Services; Tests Used In Clinical Care; [cited 2024 Apr 09]; [about 2 screens]. Available from: https://www.fda.gov/medical-devices/vitro-diagnostics/tests-used-clinical-care 
Labcorp [Internet]. Burlington (NC): Laboratory Corporation of America(r) Holdings; c2023. Patients: Test Preparation; [cited 2024 Apr 09]; [about 1 screen]. Available from: https://www.labcorp.com/patients/labs-and-appointments/test-preparation 
National Cancer Institute [Internet]. Bethesda (MD): U.S. Department of Health and Human Services; How Cancer is Diagnosed; [updated 1013 Jan 17; cited 2024 Apr 09]; [about 7 screens]. Available from: https://www.cancer.gov/about-cancer/diagnosis-staging/understanding-lab-tests-fact-sheet#what
